observation.command:
cd /workspace/YatCC && python3 -c "
# Let me check what ANTLR sees by looking at the token stream
# I'll modify the lexer to print token positions

with open('build/test/task0/functional-0/000_main.sysu.c', 'r') as f:
    content = f.read()
    lines = content.split('\n')
    for i, line in enumerate(lines):
        print(f'Line {i+1}: {repr(line)}')"
